_note: Workspace capability descriptions used by the LLM intent router (P5-FUT-006). Edit to tune routing accuracy.
auto-redteam: Offensive security, penetration testing, exploit development, reverse shells, C2 frameworks, privilege escalation, AV/EDR bypass, CTF challenges, red team operations.
auto-security: Defensive and offensive security analysis, vulnerability assessment, threat hunting, incident response, malware analysis, MITRE ATT&CK, YARA/Sigma rules, CVEs, security hardening, IDS/IPS rules.
auto-spl: Splunk SPL queries, search processing language, tstats, inputlookup, outputlookup, correlation searches, notable events, data model acceleration, Splunk Enterprise Security, detection search authoring.
auto-coding: Code generation and debugging in any language, code review, refactoring, unit tests, APIs, algorithms, data structures, Dockerfiles, CI/CD, BigFix relevance, PowerShell, Python, Bash, Terraform, Ansible.
auto-reasoning: Complex multi-step analysis, research synthesis, pros/cons evaluation, trade-off comparison, detailed breakdowns, deep dives, step-by-step explanations of complex topics.
auto-compliance: NERC CIP compliance, regulatory gap analysis, policy mapping to standards, CIP requirement citations, remediation steps, audit preparation, control evidence collection.
auto-data: Data analysis, statistics, visualization guidance, exploratory data analysis, data cleaning strategies, metric interpretation, business intelligence.
auto-research: Web research, information synthesis, fact-checking, literature review, summarising external sources, current events research.
auto-vision: Image understanding, visual analysis, multimodal tasks with attached images, diagram interpretation, object recognition, screenshot analysis.
auto-creative: Creative writing, fiction, storytelling, poetry, worldbuilding, content generation, marketing copy.
auto-documents: Creating Word documents, Excel spreadsheets, PowerPoint presentations using MCP tool servers.
auto-music: Generating music and audio via AudioCraft/MusicGen, describing musical ideas.
auto-video: Generating videos via ComfyUI/Wan2.2, describing video concepts.
auto-mistral: Structured strategic reasoning, business analysis, planning with explicit thinking mode, Mistral-lineage model requests.
auto: General conversation, questions that do not clearly fit any specialist workspace, greetings, casual chat.
